title: L59 - work_pattern_applications
description: Pattern usage tracking — records each instance of a reusable pattern (L58) being applied to a work unit (L52). Tracks adaptations made, success score, and feedback for continuous improvement. Parent: work_execution_units (CASCADE on delete).

work_unit_id.description: FK to L52 work_execution_units (CASCADE on delete). Which work unit applied this pattern.

pattern_id.description: FK to L58 work_reusable_patterns (RESTRICT on delete). Which pattern was applied.

applied_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when pattern was applied to the work unit.

adaptations_made.description: List of adaptations or deviations from the pattern template. Empty array if applied as-is.

step_number.description: Which step number was adapted (references L58 pattern.steps[].step_number)

adaptation_description.description: What was changed and why (e.g., 'Skipped validation step due to low-risk context')

adaptation_type.description: Type of adaptation made to the pattern step

success_score.description: Success rating for this application (0.0 = failed, 1.0 = perfect execution). Calculated or manually assigned.

feedback.description: Freeform feedback about pattern applicability, effectiveness, and any issues encountered.

outcome_id.description: FK to L56 work_outcomes (optional). Link to the outcome produced by applying this pattern.

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (agent, cp_agent, or persona)
